title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: AWS Developers argues that junior cloud engineers should shift focus from coding alone to understanding fundamentals like security, reliability, cost, and performance while leveraging AI agents. The video emphasizes that knowing what to build and why matters more than code generation ability.
